entries.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
entries.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

entries.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
entries.description: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscriptio

entries.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder Stack AI
entries.description: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

entries.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
entries.description: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

entries.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
entries.description: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

entries.title: In just 3 weeks, StrictlyVC is coming to Los Angeles
entries.description: StrictlyVC Los Angeles is on June 18. Join for meaningful networking and fireside chats with leaders from Mach Industries, Shinkei Systems, and more. Register today.

entries.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
entries.description: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

entries.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
entries.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

entries.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app

entries.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
entries.description: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

entries.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
entries.description: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

entries.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
entries.description: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

entries.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
entries.description: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

entries.title: 2 days left: Lock in ticket savings of up to $410 to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
entries.description: Savings of up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 tickets end tomorrow, May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save and join 10,000+ tech leaders on October 13-15 in San Francisco.

entries.title: Visa invests in Replit to power agentic payments for developers
